ddls:
CREATE TABLE "childcare_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each childcare center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the childcare center */,
  "subsidy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the center receives a subsidy (Yes/No) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of childcare provider (e.g., Non-Profit, Commercial) */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the center is located */,
  "loc_id" INTEGER /* Location identifier */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward number of the center's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for more information */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating based on parent reviews */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number for regulatory compliance */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the center */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Additional services like meals, special needs support, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the capacity record */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the childcare center */,
  "infant" INTEGER /* Number of infants the center can accommodate */,
  "toddler" INTEGER /* Number of toddlers the center can accommodate */,
  "preschooler" INTEGER /* Number of preschoolers the center can accommodate */,
  "kindergarten" INTEGER /* Number of kindergarteners the center can accommodate */,
  "waiting_list" INTEGER /* Number of children on the waiting list */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled children */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES childcare_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough this ward belongs to */,
  "ward_number" INTEGER /* Ward number */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidies" (
  "subsidy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidy record */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the childcare center receiving the subsidy */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the subsidy awarded */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the organization providing the subsidy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subsidy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subsidy */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the subsidy (e.g., operational costs, special programs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsidy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidies_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES childcare_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child being registered */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the childcare center */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., active, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if any discount was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES childcare_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the child */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the child */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the child has special needs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, register) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, admin, city official) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)
